title: KAMIKAZZI 3D
subtitle: shin kaze
startScreen.description: Strap into a rattletrap warbird and scream through the neon valley in a kamikaze streak of red and white. She rattles, she weeps, she might not make the runway — but the 405 will remember your silhouette. Punch "Start Flying" and dive the tin can past towers, tram cables, and every bad decision you've ever made.
hint:
⌨️ Arrow Keys / WASD to steer
📱 Tilt your device or drag the screen
🕹️ Use joystick (bottom-left) for touch
❓ Press ? for keyboard shortcuts

legal.title: ⚖️ Legal & Compliance
legal.section.age.title: 13+ Age Requirement
legal.section.age.body: By using KAMIKAZZI 3D, you confirm that you are at least 13 years of age. If you are under 13, you are not permitted to use this application or submit any personal information. This is in compliance with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and similar regulations in other jurisdictions.
legal.section.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.section.privacy.intro: KAMIKAZZI 3D respects your privacy. This policy explains what information is collected, how it is used, and your rights regarding your data.
legal.section.privacy.collect.body: When you sign in with Puter, we receive your username and avatar URL from Puter's authentication system. Game scores, run history, replays, settings, and community powerup submissions are stored using Puter's key-value storage (KV). If you choose not to sign in, all data is stored locally in your browser's localStorage.
legal.section.privacy.use.body: Your information is used solely for: (1) displaying leaderboard rankings, (2) saving and loading your game progress across devices, (3) enabling community features such as powerup sharing and replays, and (4) improving game experience through anonymized usage patterns. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties.
legal.section.privacy.retention.body: Puter KV data is retained as long as you maintain your Puter account. Local browser data can be cleared at any time through your browser settings. You may request deletion of your cloud data by contacting the developer.
legal.section.privacy.rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact the developer. For Puter account deletion, refer to Puter's own privacy policy and account management tools.
legal.section.terms.title: Terms & Conditions
legal.section.terms.license.body: KAMIKAZZI 3D is provided for personal, non-commercial entertainment use. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and play the game through the Puter platform.
legal.section.terms.conduct.body: You agree not to: exploit bugs or cheats, submit abusive or harmful community content, attempt to disrupt the service for other players, or reverse-engineer the application.
legal.section.terms.liability.body: KAMIKAZZI 3D is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. The developer shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this application.
legal.section.terms.termination.body: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to the service at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that violates these terms or is otherwise harmful to the community.
legal.section.terms.governing.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of California and the United States of America.
legal.section.compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
legal.section.compliance.ccpa.body: California residents have the right to: (1) know what personal information is collected and how it is used, (2) request deletion of their personal information, (3) opt out of the sale of their personal information (we do not sell personal information), and (4) not be discriminated against for exercising these rights. To make a CCPA request, contact the developer.
legal.section.compliance.gdpr.body: EU residents have the right to: (1) access their personal data, (2) rectify inaccurate data, (3) erase their data (right to be forgotten), (4) restrict processing, (5) data portability, and (6) object to processing. Data is processed under legitimate interest (game functionality) and consent (community features). To exercise GDPR rights, contact the developer.
legal.section.compliance.coppa.body: KAMIKAZZI 3D is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child under 13 has provided personal information, please contact the developer immediately so we can delete it.
legal.section.licensing.title: Licensing & Copyright
legal.section.licensing.puter.body: KAMIKAZZI 3D is published on the Puter platform. By using the application through Puter, you agree to Puter's terms of service and privacy policy. The developer grants Puter a non-exclusive license to host, display, and distribute the application on the Puter platform.
legal.section.licensing.copyright.body: © 2024-2026 David Young / Justin Time LLC, Los Angeles. All rights reserved. KAMIKAZZI 3D, the game code, visual assets, audio, and associated content are the intellectual property of David Young and Justin Time LLC. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or modification is prohibited.
legal.section.licensing.thirdparty.body: This application uses the following third-party services and libraries: Puter.js (Puter platform SDK), Three.js (3D rendering library), and various web standards (Web Audio API, WebGL, Service Workers). Each is used under its respective license.
legal.consent: By using KAMIKAZZI 3D, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these policies and agree to the terms and conditions outlined above.
legal.consent.required: First-time pilot? You need to accept the terms before taking flight.
legal.consent.checkbox: I have read and agree to the terms and conditions, privacy policy, and age requirement above.
legal.consent.saved: Consent saved. You can now fly.
legal.consent.error: You must check the box to continue.
